'''Team Kinyen''' was a team that played the [[Limmie/Legends|bolo-ball]] sport—also called limmie—for<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Strongholds">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref> [[Kinyen/Legends|Kinyen]] in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]] tournament.<ref name="HNN" /> The team was based out of the [[Grand Khanum Stadium]] in [[Capra]], a large [[City/Legends|city]] on Kinyen, and could accommodate up to 150,000 spectators for [[Galactic Cup of Limmie|Galactic Cup]] tournament matches. Team Kinyen represented one of the few offworld influences on the world's [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]], though their team often failed to qualify for the Galactic Cup despite the citizens' enthusiasm.<ref name="Strongholds" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|sports/13314_1.html|Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round}} is set on the date 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> Team Kinyen was bested by<ref name="HNN" /> the planet<ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul's]] [[Team Yag'Dhul|team]], which won their bolo-ball game with two unanswered points in the tournament's opening round. The match's result was reported in "Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round," a news story published in the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="HNN" /> Upon the Galactic Cup's suspension after the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]]<ref name="Strongholds" /> in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEGAS" /> the Grand Khanum Stadium largely fell out of use.<ref name="Strongholds" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Kinyen was first mentioned in "Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round," an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=http://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4#post-6042498}}</ref>
